headline: Cisco Systems (CSCO) Is Up 8.2% After Record AI-Focused Quarter And New Cloud Control Platform – Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: Cisco Systems recently reported record quarterly revenue with earnings above analyst expectations, raised its AI infrastructure orders target, and filed a US$41.20 million shelf registration for ESOP-related common stock offerings. The company also launched its AI-powered Cisco Cloud Control and Live Protect platforms, underscoring a push to tie networking, automation, and cybersecurity into a unified AI-centric infrastructure offering. We’ll now examine how Cisco’s new Cloud Control AI...
